description: Client account data upload from broker firms to central back-office via fixed-width card code files covering account, CSDP, addresses, FATCA/IT3 tax, and portfolio data

actors.name: Participating Broker
actors.description: Equity member firm submitting client account data

actors.name: Compliance Officer
actors.description: Broker staff member reviewing FATCA and tax compliance data

submission: MUST: Support automated file submission via secure file transfer
MUST: Support manual online upload via reporting process function
MUST: Configure notification email addresses before allowing upload submission
MUST: Provide response dataset acknowledging upload status per record
MUST: Archive processed upload files and response files
MUST: Enforce 1000-record limit per online upload file
MUST: Prevent new upload until previous upload has completed processing
validation: MUST: Validate mandatory fields on Card Code 031
MUST: Reject files with invalid Card Code 000 header
MUST: Reject entire file on fatal file-level errors (duplicate trailer, missing trailer, broker mismatch, record after trailer, trailer count mismatch)
MUST: Report field-level errors via central error enquiry and printed error report
MUST: Return response codes indicating success or failure per record
MUST: Replicate a rejected record in the response file once per failed field with each error appended
format: MUST: Use fixed-width card code record format with total record length of 700 bytes (header 30, trailer 50)
MUST: Zero-fill numeric fields and space-fill character fields when no value supplied
MUST: Start file with Header Record (Card Code 000)
MUST: End file with Trailer Record (Card Code 999)
MUST: Group related fields into logical Card Codes (031, 032, 033, 034, 035, 036, 037, 038, 039, 040)
MUST: Append sequence number (prefixed S) from header record to response file name
compliance: MUST: Support FATCA classification fields (GIIN, TIN, US person indicator)
MUST: Support Common Reporting Standard (CRS) fields including undocumented reason codes
MUST: Support IT3(b) and IT3(c) tax reporting exclusion flags
MUST: Support politically exposed person (PEP) indicator
MUST: Support dividend withholding tax (DWT) exemption — system-generated, not uploaded
identification: MUST: Use unique account number as primary identifier
MUST: Capture ID number and ID type for every client
modes: MUST: Support UPL-TYP = N (new account) — Card Code 031 or 039 is mandatory
MUST: Support UPL-TYP = U (update) — any card code acceptable
MUST: Support validate-only mode that runs all checks without committing
MUST: Support incremental merge mode that leaves unspecified fields untouched
MUST: Support full replacement mode that rolls back the entire file if any record fails (when configured)
audit: MUST: Persist every uploaded record with broker code, sequence number and submission timestamp
MUST: Log every accept/reject decision with reason codes against the original row
MUST: Retain response files and source files on daily backup for the configured retention window

errors.message: Upload file missing or invalid Card Code 000 header
Upload file rejected - see response dataset for details
Trailer record total does not match records sent
Broker code on detail record does not match header
A previous upload for this broker is still processing

automated_upload_submission.description: Broker submits upload file via automated secure file transfer

fatca_validation_check.description: Validate FATCA classification on Card Code 038

upload_validation_pass.description: All records pass validation; file is ready to commit

upload_validation_fail_partial.description: Some records failed validation; response dataset lists per-row errors

upload_full_rollback.description: Fatal file-level error or full-replacement mode with any failure - reject the entire file atomically

upload_incremental_merge.description: Incremental upload - merge only supplied fields onto existing client records, leave other fields untouched

upload_audit_trail.description: Persist a full audit trail of every uploaded record and its accept/reject decision

generate_response_dataset.description: Generate response dataset with per-record status

archive_upload.description: Archive processed upload file and response file

goals.description: Client account data upload from broker firms to central back-office via fixed-width card code files covering account, CSDP, addresses, FATCA/IT3 tax, and portfolio data

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: trading operations require precise execution and full audit trails

invariants: error messages never expose internal system details

upload_card_codes.999: Trailer Record - record counts and file control totals
upload_card_codes.000: Header Record - file metadata and broker identification
upload_card_codes.031: Mandatory, Conditionally Optional and Frequently Used Optional fields - core client account details
upload_card_codes.032: CSDP Details - central security depository participant account info
upload_card_codes.033: All Other Fields - safe custody, telephones, risk rating, credit limits
upload_card_codes.034: Portfolio Details - advisor code, accumulated profit, investment type
upload_card_codes.035: Banking Details - bank branch, account number, preferred account flag
upload_card_codes.036: Additional Client Maintenance fields - nameless account descriptor, POA, source of income, TFSA, trading address, reason for no tax number
upload_card_codes.037: Additional Address Maintenance fields - physical address, additional phone/fax/email/cell contacts
upload_card_codes.038: Legal and Tax Maintenance fields - FATCA, CRS, IT3, PEP, sanctions, GIIN, indicia, TIN
upload_card_codes.039: Supplementary Names and Address Details Record - linked account holders for joint or nominee accounts
upload_card_codes.040: Account Relationships - links between supplementary accounts and main client accounts

scope.label: Full replacement
scope.description: Entire file must succeed end-to-end; any failure rolls the whole file back atomically

scope.label: Incremental merge
scope.description: Only supplied fields overwrite existing records; other fields are preserved; failed rows are rejected individually

commit.label: Validate only
commit.description: Run all validations and return a response dataset without persisting any changes

commit.label: Validate and commit
commit.description: Persist valid records and return a response dataset listing any rejections

fields.name: TOTAL-RECORDS
fields.description: Total records excluding header and trailer

fields.name: FILLER
fields.description: Original uploaded record payload (space-filled on summary row)

fields.name: COUNT-OF-MSGS-FOR-LINE
fields.description: Count of errors appended to this line

fields.name: ERROR-MESSAGE
fields.description: Error message code appended to the uploaded row

fatal_file_errors: BRK CDE NOT SAME AS HDR
TRAILER REC TOTAL NOT SAME AS RECS SENT
validation_response.error_row_behaviour: For each failed field the uploaded row is replicated and the error description appended; the numeric prefix on each error line indicates the count of errors for that uploaded record (e.g. "002INVALID PRINCIPLE/AGENCY INDICATOR").

fields.name: TOTAL-RECORDS
fields.description: Total records excluding header and trailer

CARD_031.description: Mandatory, Conditionally Optional and Frequently Used Optional fields

fields.name: LEG-ENT-CDE
fields.description: Legal entity code - mandatory if REPORTING-ACCOUNT=Y

fields.name: BND-NAME
fields.description: Clean name for central depository dissemination

CARD_039.description: Supplementary names and address details - joint and nominee holders

CARD_040.description: Account relationships - links between supplementary and main accounts

fields.name: SUPP-ACC-BRK
fields.description: Numeric broker code of linked account

submission_methods: Manual online upload via reporting function
delivery_workflow: 2. Upload file submission (automated file transfer or manual)
3. Error reporting via central error enquiry and printed error report
compliance_standards: Local IT3(b) and IT3(c) tax reporting
